---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

## Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Reproduction Steps

Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Screenshots or Logs

If applicable, add screenshots or paste terminal/server logs to help explain the problem.

## Environment Details

- **OS**: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS Sequoia, Ubuntu 24.04]
- **Node.js version**: [e.g. 20.11.0]
- **Python version**: [e.g. 3.11.5]
- **Rust version (if contract bug)**: [e.g. 1.78.0]
- **Stellar CLI version**: [e.g. 21.0.0]

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.
